word_list.word: there is nothing new under the sun
word_list.pronunciation: √į…õ…Ļ …™z nňą Ćőł…™Ňč nňąuňź ňĆ Ćnd…ö √į…ô sňą Ćn

senses.definition: used to suggest that everything that happens or exists has already been experienced or observed in some form before

examples.x: When Sarah's company launched a new product, she was excited about the innovative features and design - but upon further research, she realized that similar products had been available for years, proving that there is nothing new under the sun.

senses.definition: used to imply that a new person, who is not yet set in their ways, is more efficient and effective in implementing change than someone who has been in the position for a long time

word_list.pronunciation: ňą…õv…Ļi ňąe…™d í h…źz …™ts bňą äk

senses.definition: used to encourage individuals to recognize and appreciate the fact that every historical period or generation has a unique perspective and approach to understanding the world

senses.definition: used to suggest that the greatest successes or pleasures in life can sometimes lead to the greatest failures or disappointments

word_list.word: there are no birds in last year's nest
word_list.pronunciation: √į…õ…ĻňĆ…Ďňź…Ļ nňąo ä bňą…úňźdz …™n lňą√¶st jňą…™…Ļz nňą…õst

senses.definition: used to suggest that conditions and circumstances are always changing, and that relying on past successes or achievements is not a guarantee of future success

examples.x: Although the project had been successful in the past, there are no birds in last year's nest - they needed to come up with new ideas and strategies to keep it relevant.

word_list.word: times change and we with time
word_list.pronunciation: tňąa…™mz t Éňąe…™nd í √¶nd wiňź w…™√į tňąa…™m

senses.definition: used to say that as time passes, people may adapt and change to new circumstances and situations, including societal norms and standards

examples.x: She had been resistant to new technology, but times change and we with time - she had to learn how to use the latest devices.

word_list.word: variety is the spice of life

senses.definition: used to imply that it is important to seek out and embrace new experiences, activities, and pleasures in life to keep things interesting and enjoyable

examples.x: He loved to travel and explore new places, believing that variety is the spice of life.
